evals.prompt: Update my pomodoro timer app at apps/pomodoro-timer/ to let me customize the session and break lengths. Add a small settings panel where I can type in how many minutes I want for work and break instead of the hardcoded 25/5. The existing timer, session counter, and AI encouragement should all still work.
evals.expected_output: App.jsx has input fields for custom work/break durations; timer logic uses the custom values; existing countdown, session counter, and AI encouragement still present and functional; dist/index.html rebuilt.

assertions.name: custom_duration_input
assertions.description: App.jsx has an input or number field for custom duration

assertions.name: timer_still_present
assertions.description: Existing setInterval timer logic is preserved

assertions.name: ai_still_present
assertions.description: AI encouragement via streamCompletion is preserved
